appTagline: Kumasulira kwa AI kwa nthawi yeniyeni

rooms.title: Zipinda zomasulira
rooms.subtitle: Magawo anu omasulira nthawi imodzi
rooms.noRoomsInCategory: Palibe zipinda zomwe zili m'gululi pakadali pano.

confirmDelete.title: Chotsani chipinda kwamuyaya?
confirmDelete.message: Izi zitseka msonkhano wa onse omwe akutenga nawo mbali ndikuchotsa deta yonse.

enterprise.label: Zokonda za Makampani
enterprise.sub: Kiyi ya Gemini, Quest Flow, ma tag, CRM

call.playgroundTip: Tumizani mawu ku malo ophunzitsira a AI
call.expandPeerSub: Wolankhulana naye ali pa sikirini yonse, muli pakona
call.roomFull: 🚫 Chipinda chili ndi anthu ambiri - pali kale anthu awiri omwe ali mmenemo

coach.title: Wothandizira AI: Momwe Mungayankhire
coach.promptPlaceholder: Funsani chilichonse - chokhudza zokambirana kapena funso lililonse lanu

tonePrompts.joke: Yankhani ndi nthabwala yopepuka komanso yoyenera.
tonePrompts.deep: Perekani yankho lozama lofotokoza bwino lomwe lili ndi zifukwa zomveka.
tonePrompts.scientific: Yankhani ngati wasayansi, ndi maulalo opita ku kafukufuku kapena deta.
tonePrompts.empathic: Yankhani mwachifundo, zindikirani momwe munthu winayo akumvera.

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: Boti yomasulira yayimitsidwa. Chonde gulani mphindi zina.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Gulani mphindi zina kuti mupitirize kukambirana.
billing.paywallNoSub: Kuti mupange chipinda, chonde lembani dongosolo
billing.paywallLowBalance: Palibe mphindi zotsala pa ndalama zomwe muli nazo - lembani kuti mupeze pulani kapena gulani zina

changePwd.title: Sinthani mawu achinsinsi
changePwd.errSameAsOld: Mawu achinsinsi atsopano akufanana ndi akale
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Mawu achinsinsi omwe alipo pano ndi olakwika
changePwd.errNoPassword: Kusintha mawu achinsinsi sikukupezeka pa akaunti iyi (kulowa mu akaunti ya Google).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: Mawu achinsinsi a super-admin aikidwa mu kasinthidwe ka seva.

sip.title: Telefoni ya SIP
sip.subtitle: Kukhazikitsa ma trunk a mafoni obwera ndi otuluka
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Mawu achinsinsi atsopano (siyani opanda kanthu kuti musasinthe)

incoming.heading: Mafoni a SIP omwe akubwera
incoming.lead: Adilesi yapadera ya SIP yotumizira mafoni akunja kuchokera kwa opereka chithandizo chanu kupita ku dongosolo la VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: Adilesi ya SIP yomwe ikubwera sinapangidwe
incoming.emptyHint: Pangani SIP URI yapadera + login/password kuti makasitomala athe kukuyimbirani kuchokera pafoni iliyonse, ndipo VibeVox idzamasulira mawu anu nthawi yomweyo.
incoming.create: Pangani adilesi ya SIP ya mafoni obwera
incoming.paused: Adilesi ya SIP yapangidwa, malo olandirira alendo ayimitsidwa
incoming.activeHint: Womasulira wa Bridge amamvetsera chipindacho. Kuyimba kulikonse kumamasuliridwa nthawi yeniyeni.
incoming.pausedHint: Yambitsani kulandila kuti VibeVox iyambe kutumiza mafoni obwera.
incoming.createdToast: Adilesi ya SIP yomwe ikubwera yapangidwa
incoming.deletedToast: Adilesi ya SIP yomwe ikubwera yachotsedwa

outbound.heading: Kuyimba kotuluka
outbound.lead: Imbani nambala ya foni kuchokera pa intaneti ndipo VibeVox idzamasulira zokha zokambirana zanu nthawi yomweyo.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Choyamba, khazikitsani trunk ya SIP yotuluka
outbound.noTrunkHint: Lembani fomu ya "Thunthu latsopano la SIP" pamwamba pa tsamba - VibeVox idzagwiritsa ntchito wopereka wanu wa SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, ndi zina zotero) pama foni otuluka.
outbound.configureFirst: Choyamba, khazikitsani trunk ya SIP yotuluka (yomwe ili pamwambapa)
outbound.invalidNumber: Chonde lowetsani nambala yolondola mu mtundu wapadziko lonse lapansi (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Momwe mungakhazikitsire
howTo.step1: Pezani ziphaso za trunk ya SIP kuchokera kwa omwe akukupatsani (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Lembani mu fomu yomwe ili pamwambapa ndikusunga.
howTo.step3: VibeVox ipanga yokha thunthu la SIP lomwe limatuluka mu LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Ikubwera posachedwa: SIP URI yomwe ikubwera yotumizira mafoni akunja.

toasts.saved: Zokonda za trunk ya SIP zasungidwa

tenantOnly.title: Ma trunk a SIP amakonzedwa pamlingo wa lendi
tenantOnly.hint1: Telefoni ya SIP singathe kukhazikitsidwa pansi pa akaunti ya superadmin (popanda UUID ya lendi).
tenantOnly.hint2: Lowani ngati wogwiritsa ntchito wamba yemwe ali ndi tenantId yakeyake kuti apange trunk.

sip.connected: Thunthu la SIP limasungidwa ndikugwirizanitsidwa ndi LiveKit

sections.providerData: Tsatanetsatane wa wopereka wanu wa SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Kakonzedwe kake kadzachotsedwa. Mafoni otuluka adzayima mpaka mutapanganso thunthu.
danger.deleteInbound: Chotsani adilesi ya SIP pama foni obwera
danger.deleteInboundHint: Lamulo la LiveKit lolowera ndi lotumiza lidzachotsedwa. Mafoni obwera sadzalandiridwanso.
danger.reissueHint: Tulutsaninso dzina lolowera ndi mawu achinsinsi a adilesi ya SIP. Zambiri zakale sizigwiranso ntchito.

outbound2.rateInfo: Mtengo pa mphindi iliyonse ya foni yotuluka umatsimikiziridwa ndi wopereka chithandizo cha SIP yanu.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Izi sizingasinthe. Mukachotsa, mafoni otuluka adzayima mpaka trunk yatsopano ipangidwe.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Chotsani adilesi ya SIP pama foni obwera?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Izi sizingasinthe. Lamulo la trunk yolowera ndi lamulo lotumiza mu LiveKit Cloud lidzachotsedwa.

page.title: Zokonda za Makampani
page.subtitle: Zogwirizanitsa zonse, makiyi, ndi magawo a AI a akaunti yanu
page.upsellTitle: Gawo ili likupezeka pa dongosolo la Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Apa mutha kukonza: kiyi ya Gemini API yanu, chidziwitso chambiri komanso maziko a chidziwitso, kuphatikiza ndi Quest Flow + Telegram bot, ndikulumikiza ku Chatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Kiyi ya Google Gemini API
gemini.lead: Kiyi yanu yachinsinsi kuchokera ku AI Studio. Kiyi iyi imalowa m'malo mwa kiyi yapadziko lonse ya mafoni onse a Gemini pa akaunti yanu.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Imagwiritsidwa ntchito m'malo mwa yapadziko lonse lapansi pama foni onse a Gemini omwe ali pa akaunti yanu.
gemini.errEnterKey: Lowetsani kiyi yanu ya Gemini API
gemini.successSavedValidated: Kiyi yasungidwa ndipo yatsimikiziridwa - ikugwira ntchito.
gemini.successValid: Kiyi yake ndi yovomerezeka - Gemini API ikupezeka.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Chotsani kiyi ya Gemini ya wobwereketsa aliyense?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Ntchito za AI zidzagwiritsa ntchito kiyi yogawana ya VibeVox (ngati yakonzedwa).

telegram.heading: Boti ya Telegram yopezera zidziwitso
telegram.lead: Pangani bot ndi @BotFather ndikuyika token yake. Aliyense amene adzatumize uthenga ku bot iyi ndi /start adzalandira zidziwitso: makasitomala atsopano, ma tag, zolakwika zogwirizanitsa. Mutha kulembetsa antchito angapo kapena kuwonjezera bot ku gulu kapena njira—zidziwitsozo zidzatumizidwa kwa aliyense zokha.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , idzalandira zidziwitso zokhudza makasitomala atsopano, ma tag, ndi zolakwika zogwirizanitsa. Mutha kulembetsa antchito angapo kapena kuwonjezera bot ku gulu kapena njira—aliyense adzalandira zidziwitsozo zokha.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yasungidwa. Moni waperekedwa kwa olembetsa a {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yasungidwa. Aliyense amene angatumize uthenga /start adzalandira zidziwitso.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Uthenga waperekedwa kwa olandira {{count}}. Chonde onani Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Tumizani chidziwitso cha mayeso kudzera pa bot
telegram.lastBroadcast: Kutumiza makalata kwaposachedwa: kwatumizidwa {{sent}} kuchokera ku {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Sungani ndi kutsimikizira kiyi ya API kaye — kupanga zithunzi kukufunika.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana imapanga, kusintha, ndi kupanga zinthu. Imagen imangopangidwa kuyambira pachiyambi.

prompt.heading: Malangizo
prompt.subtitle: Chidziwitso ndi chidziwitso chokhudza kulemba mawu m'zipinda zamakanema zokha
prompt.kbLabel: Chidziwitso (nkhani ya kampani, Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri, mfundo zenizeni)
prompt.showDefault: Kodi AI imagwiritsa ntchito chiyani mwachisawawa?
prompt.appendNote: Mukhoza kuwonjezera malamulo anu - adzaphatikizidwa ndi pempho lokhazikika.
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - mukadina uthenga mu macheza ndikusankha kamvekedwe
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Imagwiritsidwa ntchito mukadina uthenga mu kanema chat ndikusankha kamvekedwe
prompt.defaultSummary: Zimene AI imagwiritsa ntchito mwachisawawa (ngati munda wanu uli wopanda kanthu) - dinani kuti muwone
prompt.extendNoteText: ndi malamulo/kalembedwe/mawu awoawo - adzaphatikizidwa ndi pempho lokhazikika pamwambapa ndi chidziwitso.
prompt.kbLead: Kwezani chikalata—kabukhu, Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri, mndandanda wamitengo, malamulo, kapena zinthu zowunikira. Zomwe zili mkati mwake zimawerengedwa pa seva (Word/Excel/CSV → mawu) ndipo zimaphatikizidwa ndi AI polemba mauthenga m'zipinda zamavidiyo. Malire: Fayilo ya 50 MB / zilembo 500,000 mu database.
prompt.successFileTruncated: Zomwe zili mkati mwake zafupikitsidwa kukhala zilembo za {{max}}.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Mapepala onse omwe atumizidwa adzasowa. Izi sizingasinthidwe.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Mu macheza a Enterprise Room, mutha kuyika uthenga uliwonse ndikupempha AI kuti iwufotokoze m'mawu osankhidwa.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: imagwiritsa ntchito pempho lanu kuchokera kumunda womwe uli pamwambapa.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Mayankho a AI kwa makasitomala kudzera pa Telegram bots ndi Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Ngati mundawo uli wopanda kanthu, pempho lonse la VibeVox limagwiritsidwa ntchito.
questFlow.promptLabel: Pempho la dongosolo la Quest Flow
questFlow.headerLead: Kukambirana kwa AI ndi kasitomala aliyense payekhapayekha kudzera pa bot ya Telegram yolumikizidwa ndi Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysHeading: Makiyi a API a Quest Flow
questFlow.keysLead: Kiyi iliyonse ndi chinsinsi chomwe mumayika mu block ya Quest Flow HTTP ya unyolo. VibeVox imagwiritsa ntchito kuzindikira akaunti yanu. Mutha kupanga makiyi angapo a unyolo wosiyanasiyana.
questFlow.promptLead1: Imazindikira momwe AI imalumikizirana ndi makasitomala kudzera mu Quest Flow: kamvekedwe, kalembedwe, zomwe ziyenera kudziwika.
questFlow.promptLead2: — pempho lonse la VibeVox limagwiritsidwa ntchito (pansipa).
questFlow.promptLead3: - idzaphatikizidwa ndi pempho loyambira komanso chidziwitso.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Zimene AI imagwiritsa ntchito mwachisawawa (ngati munda wanu uli wopanda kanthu) - dinani kuti muwone
questFlow.kbLead1: Zikalata - kabukhu kautumiki, mndandanda wamitengo, Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri. Kwezani TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI sidzakhala ndi mfundo za kampani; idzayankha potengera chidziwitso cha anthu onse. Maziko awa
questFlow.kbLead3: Kuchokera mu gawo la "Malangizo"—la kulembera kanema. Malire: Fayilo ya 50 MB / zilembo 500,000 mu database.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Chidziwitso cha Quest Flow chidzachotsedwa. Izi sizingasinthidwe.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI imapatsa makasitomala ma tag awa ngati awona kuti pali ofanana mu zokambiranazo. Ma tagwo amawonetsedwa pa khadi la chipinda cha kasitomala ndikutumizidwa ku CRM (Gawo 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Kiyi idzachotsedwa kwamuyaya. Quest Flow idzasiya kugwira ntchito kudzera mmenemo — muyenera kupanga kiyi yatsopano ndikuyiyika m'malo mwa yomwe ilipo.

chatwoot.heading: Kuphatikiza kwa CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Tumizani mbiri ya mafoni ndi ma tag ku Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Kusamutsa mbiri ya zokambirana ndi ma tag omwe makasitomala amafunikira ku Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: Ulalo wa Chatwoot (wodzipangira wekha kapena app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Agent Access Token (kuchokera ku Profile → Access Token)
chatwoot.successSaved: Yasungidwa. Tsopano dinani "Yesani Kulumikizana" kuti muwone.
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Kulumikizana ndi kasitomala (ndi telegram_user_id, ndi custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Kukambirana ndi cholembera chachinsinsi = mbiri yonse ya zokambirana
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Ma tag onse operekedwa a zosowa mu
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Zimatumizidwa mukadina pamanja "Tumizani ku CRM" mu chipinda chochezera. Kutumiza kokha mukazindikira chizindikiro ndi chinthu chotsatira.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Izi sizingasinthidwe. Mau ndi zinthu zomwe zaikidwa zidzachotsedwa.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Malo ochezera ndi gawo la Enterprise. Sinthani dongosolo lanu mu gawo la "Mitengo".
chat.empty: Palibe mauthenga omwe ali mu macheza awa pakadali pano.

insights.title: Kusanthula zokambirana
insights.tooShort: Nkhaniyi ndi yaifupi kwambiri moti singathe kusanthulidwa.

lobby.title: Kulowa nawo msonkhano wa kanema
lobby.subtitle: Kuyimba pavidiyo ndi kumasulira kwa AI nthawi imodzi
lobby.languageHint: Mudzamva ndi kuwona mawu ang'onoang'ono ochokera kwa wolankhulana nanu m'chinenero chimenecho.
lobby.shareHint: Koperani ndikutumiza kwa wolankhulana nanu kuti amuitanire ku msonkhano.
lobby.audioConsent: , komanso kuvomereza kuti mawu agwiritsidwe ntchito pomasulira.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Pali kale munthu amene akutenga nawo mbali pamsonkhanowu. Lumikizanani ndi wopanga msonkhanowo kapena pemphani wina watsopano.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Ulalowu wakopedwa. Tumizani kwa munthu amene mumalumikizana naye kudzera pa Telegram / WhatsApp / Imelo. Mutha kutseka tsamba lino—ulalowu umagwira ntchito nthawi zonse.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Kuti mupange chipinda, chonde lembani dongosolo
paywall.titleLowBalance: Palibe mphindi zotsala pa ndalama zomwe muli nazo - lembani kuti mupeze pulani kapena gulani zina
paywall.subtitle: Sankhani dongosolo kapena gulani mphindi zina - lipirani kudzera mu Stripe, bwezerani ndalama nthawi yomweyo apa.
paywall.featureHd: Mawu a HD, kanema, Mphunzitsi wa AI
paywall.topupNote: Mphindi zidzawonjezedwa ku ndalama zomwe mwatsala mutamaliza kulipira.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Mulibe kulembetsa komwe kukuchitika. Plus kudzawonjezedwa pa kugula kwanu pa €19 pamwezi—mphindi 60 zikuphatikizidwa mu dongosolo lanu, kotero palibe ndalama zowonjezera.
paywall.stripeNote: Malipiro amatetezedwa ndi Stripe. Mphindi zimayikidwa zokha pambuyo polipira.

billingPage.title: Mitengo ndi malipiro
billingPage.subtitle: Zinthu zonse za VibeVox — sankhani dongosolo lomwe likugwirizana ndi liwiro lanu la ntchito.
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Letsani kukonzanso kokha kwa kulembetsa kwanu?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Letsani kukonzanso kokha. Kulembetsa kwanu kudzakhalabe kogwira ntchito mpaka kumapeto kwa nthawi yomwe ilipo.
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Malipiro otsatira adzachitika kumapeto kwa nthawi yomwe ilipo.
billingPage.promoHint: Kuchotsera kudzachitika zokha mukalembetsa dongosolo kapena kugula mphindi zina.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Mphindi zomwe zinatengedwa kuchokera ku nthawi yapitayi. Zitha kaye.
billingPage.topupHelp: Cholozera china chogulira. Chimapezeka ndi kulembetsa komwe kukuchitika.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Kwa zokambirana zachinsinsi ndi ogwira ntchito pawokha
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Kwa magulu ndi okambirana omwe akugwira ntchito
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Mulu wonse wa AI wa bizinesi
billingPage.featureHd: Mawu omasulira a HD (Aoede, Charon, Kore)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: Malo Ophunzirira a AI — zilankhulo zake
billingPage.featureRollover: Kupitilira mphindi zochepa kupita ku mwezi wotsatira
billingPage.featureCRM: Makhadi a makasitomala omwe ali ndi kuzindikira kodziyimira pawokha
billingPage.featureTelegramAuth: Chilolezo cha telegram + kulumikizana ndi khadi
billingPage.featureCalendar: Kalendala ya Google - Maulendo a Makasitomala
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Moni! Ndikufuna kudziwa zambiri za dongosolo la Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.faqQ1: Kodi chimachitika ndi chiyani ndi mphindi zosagwiritsidwa ntchito?
billingPage.faqA1: Mphindi zosagwiritsidwa ntchito zimapitirira mpaka mwezi wotsatira. Zimatha ntchito mwezi wachitatu.
billingPage.faqQ2: Kodi ndingaletse kulembetsa kwanga nthawi iliyonse?
billingPage.faqA2: Inde. Mutha kuletsa akaunti yanu podina kamodzi. Nthawi yolipirira kale ipitilira mpaka kumapeto.
billingPage.faqA3: Gulu lonse la AI: makadi a makasitomala omwe ali ndi chidziwitso chodziyimira pawokha, chilolezo cha Telegram, mapempho odziyimira pawokha, Google Calendar, ma tagging anzeru, kutumiza CRM, kuphatikiza ndi questflow.pro, ndi tabu yosiyana ya admin.
billingPage.faqQ4: Ndi kampani iti ya SIP yomwe mukufuna?
billingPage.faqA4: Chilichonse chogwirizana ndi RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, ndi zina zotero. VibeVox imapanga thunthu lotuluka lokha.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 pamphindi. Kuyambira mphindi 60 mpaka maola 10. Amalandira ngongole nthawi yomweyo mutalipira.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: ndi kuchotsera kwa -{{percent}}% ndi khodi yotsatsira {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Maminiti a pulani alipo mpaka tsiku lino; mphindi zina zitha kugulidwa.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Maminiti a pulani yanu ndi ogwira ntchito mpaka tsiku lino; mutha kugula ena. Dinani "Yambitsaninso" ngati mwasintha maganizo anu.
billingPage.languagesLead: Mndandanda wathunthu wa zilankhulo zomwe zimathandizidwa ndi kumasulira nthawi yomweyo. Kuzindikira chilankhulo chochokera chokha—wotenga nawo mbali aliyense amasankha chilankhulo chake.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Chilankhulocho sichinapezeke pamndandanda wa omwe akuthandizidwa.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Yesani kalembedwe kosiyana—monga Chingerezi kapena zilembo zakomweko. Ngati chilankhulocho sichikupezeka, tidziwitseni, ndipo tidzachiwonjezera.

login.title: Takulandirani
login.subtitle: Lowani mu akaunti yanu ya VibeVox

register.title: Pangani akaunti
register.subtitle: Kulembetsa kwaulere pa VibeVox
register.passwordTooShort: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi zilembo zosachepera 8
register.emailExists: Wogwiritsa ntchito imelo iyi walembetsa kale.

forgot.title: Kubwezeretsa mawu achinsinsi
forgot.subtitle: Lowetsani imelo yanu ndipo tidzakutumizirani ulalo woti mubwezeretse.
forgot.successHint: Yang'anani imelo yanu ngati ili ndi {{email}}. Ngati simukuona imeloyo, yang'anani chikwatu chanu cha sipamu.

googleCallback.loading: Kutsimikizira kulowa kwanu kudzera pa Google…

reset.title: Mawu Achinsinsi Atsopano
reset.subtitle: Sankhani mawu achinsinsi atsopano kuti mulowe.
reset.successHint: Tsopano mutha kulowa ndi mawu anu achinsinsi atsopano.
reset.invalidLink: Ulalowu ndi wosavomerezeka kapena watha ntchito. Pemphani kuti musinthe mawu achinsinsi atsopano.

seo.title: VibeVox — Kutanthauzira kwa AI kwa nthawi yeniyeni kwa mafoni apakanema ndi ma SIP
seo.description: VibeVox ndi nsanja yomasulira mawu yomwe imagwiritsa ntchito AI nthawi imodzi yomwe imathandizira zilankhulo zoposa 100. Mafoni apakanema, mafoni a SIP, macheza a makasitomala, ndi kusanthula zokambirana pogwiritsa ntchito AI zilipo.
seo.keywords: Kumasulira kwa AI, kumasulira nthawi imodzi, kuyimba makanema ndi kumasulira, SIP telephony, womasulira mawu

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox ndi womasulira wa AI wogwiritsa ntchito nthawi imodzi polankhula ndi anthu komanso pavidiyo m'zilankhulo 108. WebRTC ndi SIP telephony, wothandizira mawu, komanso womasulira nthawi yeniyeni amagwira ntchito pa chipangizo chilichonse.
pwaInstall.installCta: Onjezani VibeVox pazenera lanu loyamba—mafoni okhala ndi kumasulira, SIP, ndi wothandizira AI kamodzi kokha. Imagwira ntchito ngati pulogalamu yachikhalidwe.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Pitani ku tsamba loyamba - yambitsani kamodzi kokha

partner.title: Pulogalamu ya mgwirizano
partner.subtitle: Gawani ulalo wanu ndikupeza ndalama
partner.termsEmpty: Malamulo a pulogalamu sanakhazikitsidwebe. Chonde lumikizanani ndi SuperAdmin.
